description: Deployment lifecycle commissioning event — terminal record for either the entry-to-service moment (`commissioning-active`) OR the deliberate end-of-service moment (`decommissioned`). Emitted by CommissioningCell (phase 4, leaderNode simeon) for activation events and DecommissionCell (phase 6, leaderNode dan, cron-triggered) for retirement events. The lifecycle stage is the discriminator. Per ADR-2605201400.

lifecycleStage.description: Discriminator. `commissioning-active` = site enters service (phase 4 output). `decommissioned` = deliberate end-of-service (phase 6 output).

effectiveAt.description: Timestamp the lifecycle transition becomes effective.

lastProgressId.description: REQUIRED when lifecycleStage is `commissioning-active`. Final recordConstructionProgress.progressId at phase `commissioning-ready`.

lastAuditEventId.description: REQUIRED when lifecycleStage is `decommissioned`. Final recordPhysicalAuditEvent.auditEventId at scope `decommission-pre-check` with outcome `pass-*`.

councilSignatures.description: ≥3 Council Lv6+ signatures REQUIRED for both commissioning-active (entering service) and decommissioned (retiring) — symmetric governance lifecycle. Per ADR-2605201400 §7.

handoffDocumentIpfsCid.description: IPFS CID of the handoff document. For commissioning-active: operations runbook. For decommissioned: disposal/transition plan.
